#!/bin/bash
set -e

cd /app

# Generate the report
java -cp build Main app/customers.csv /tmp/report.txt

echo "--- Report Output ---"
cat /tmp/report.txt
echo "---------------------"

# Check that non-ASCII names survived the round-trip correctly
FAILURES=0

check_name() {
    local expected="$1"
    if grep -q "$expected" /tmp/report.txt; then
        echo "OK: Found '$expected'"
    else
        echo "FAIL: Expected '$expected' but not found in report"
        FAILURES=$((FAILURES + 1))
    f

cmd: cd /app && javac -encoding UTF-8 -d build app/CsvReader.java app/CustomerRecord.java app/ReportGenerator.java app/Main.java 2>&1
